equity.label: S&P 500 equity signal
equity.note: A 5-session drawdown adds pressure. A 5-session rally adds relief and can partially offset the composite score.

rates.label: 2Y Treasury rate pressure
rates.note: Rates pressure reflects both the current 2Y level and any fresh 5-session rise.

inflation.label: Inflation expectations pressure
inflation.note: Inflation pressure reflects both the breakeven level and any fresh 5-session rise.

volatility.label: VIX volatility pressure
volatility.note: Higher implied volatility usually means greater market stress.

title: 2026-02-13 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 25.10
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2026-02-13: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 25.10/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as volatility and equity signal shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2026-02-13, the score printed 25.10/100 in the elevated regime, with volatility and equity signal doing most of the work.
